title: peristera althaeoides
intro: Peristera althaeoides, also known as the peristera or althaea, is a plant species belonging to the genus Peristera within the family Malpighiaceae, although some sources place it in the family Malvaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Peristera althaeoides is used to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues, due to its potential to promote tissue repair, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Peristera althaeoides include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues.
